name: Omni
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the Omni service and basic metadata extraction.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can properly reach the service and authenticate with the given credentials.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to Omni, please validate the credentials

steps.name: GetDashboards
steps.description: List the documents/dashboards available to the user.
